/usr/sbin/c++ -fPIC -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/AuroraTarget_shared.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libAuroraTarget.so -o libAuroraTarget.so CMakeFiles/AuroraTarget_shared.dir/TargetMachine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AuroraTarget_shared.dir/TargetRegisterInfo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AuroraTarget_shared.dir/TargetInstrInfo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AuroraTarget_shared.dir/TargetLowering.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AuroraTarget_shared.dir/TargetCallingConv.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AuroraTarget_shared.dir/TargetFrameLowering.cpp.o  ../Air/libAuroraAir.a ../ADT/libAuroraADT.a
